ValueSet-HIV.D.DE956.title: TB screening algorithm ValueSet Schema
ValueSet-HIV.D.DE956.description: JSON Schema for TB screening algorithm ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
ValueSet-HIV.D.DE956.narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the TB screening algorithm ValueSet ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/hiv/ValueSet-HIV.D.DE956.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
